speaker: baer
text: I understand the theory behind masking and trying to adjust for it, but I feel that comprehending the details of the approach and, importantly, which approach is 'better,' is beyond my training and experience. I think someone with more data mining expertise would have to be involved in that decision.
context: Baer wrote to Menschik about Szarfman's 2022 masking paper, conceding that someone with more data mining expertise should make the call between methodologies.
